name: sd_image_gen
description: Generate an image using a local Stable Diffusion model. Returns the generated image for the model to view.

params.name: prompt
params.description: Text description of the image to generate. Tag order: [quality/meta/year/safety tags] [1girl/1boy/1other etc] [character] [series] [@artist] [general tags]

params.name: negative_prompt
params.description: Things to avoid in the generated image; default one provided if not specified.

params.name: width
params.description: Image width in pixels. Default varies by model; safe range is typically 512-1536.

params.name: height
params.description: Image height in pixels. Default varies by model; safe range is typically 512-1536.
